title: Specklinia pidax
taxonomy: Specklinia pidax is classified as a species of orchid in the genus Specklinia. It is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Specklinia pidax belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is often found growing on trees in humid, shaded areas. The species is further classified into the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, which is a group of terrestrial and epiphytic orchids. Specklinia pidax is a relatively rare species, and its classification is of interest to botanists and orchid enthusiasts.
